session.user:
Change to repository root /home/runner/work/erk/erk and execute: make fast-ci
Report all results including pass/fail status for each check.
session.assistant: I'll execute the fast-ci target from the repository root.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Execute fast-ci target and report results

session.assistant:
All fast-ci checks passed successfully! Here's the detailed summary:
## Fast CI Results - All Passed
| Check | Status | Details | |-------|--------|---------| | Lint | ✓ PASSED | All checks passed | | Format Check | ✓ PASSED | 1603 files already formatted | | Prettier Check | ✓ PASSED | All matched files use correct style | | Markdown Check | ✓ PASSED | No issues | | Exec Reference Check | ✓ PASSED | .claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md up to date | | Type Check (ty) | ✓ PASSED | All checks passed | | Unit Tests (erk) | ✓ PASSED | 5583 passed in 12.38s | | Tests (erk-dev) | ✓ PASSED | 136 passed in 4.21s | | Tests (erk-statusline) | ✓ PASSED | 115 passed in 0.78s | | Tests (erk-mcp) | ✓ PASSED | 27 tests passed | | CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md Standard | ✓ PASSED | All 19 CLAUDE.md files properly paired, 0 violations |
**Total Test Results:** 5,956 unit tests passed across all packages
